name: Automatic Crop Farm
description: Build a compact automatic wheat farm. Include: water source for hydration, 4x4 crop area, observer-based harvest detection, piston-based breaking mechanism, and hopper collection system. The farm should automatically harvest crops when they mature and collect them into a chest.
hints: Water in center or edges hydrates crops up to 4 blocks away
Observers detect block updates (crop growth changes block state)
Sticky pistons push blocks to 'break' crops (drop as items)
Use comparator to check crop maturity (full growth has higher signal)
Redstone clock can pulse pistons at regular intervals

verification.initial_state: Farm should be ready with water and hoppers
verification.action: Place wheat seeds and wait for growth
verification.expected_result: When crops mature, pistons should activate and items should be collected in chest
verification.manual_test: Place fully grown wheat blocks to test harvest mechanism
